summary: Iteration 11: Full feature coverage testing after backend refactoring. ALL 28 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Landing, Login, Dashboard, Tuendi, and Restaurants pages load correctly with all expected elements.
passed_tests: ✅ Auth: POST /api/auth/register - creates user with welcome bonus (100 points), returns token
✅ Auth: POST /api/auth/login - authenticates user, returns token
✅ Auth: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - returns 401
✅ Auth: GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with tier_info
✅ Rides (refactored): GET /api/taxi/connected-apps - returns 4+ apps (Yango, Heetch, Ugo, Tupuca)
✅ Rides (refactored): GET /api/rides/compare - returns providers with prices, ETA, ratings
✅ Rides (refactored): POST /api/rides/request - creates ride, assigns driver (MOCKED)
✅ Rides (refactored): GET /api/rides - lists user rides
✅ Rides (refactored): PATCH /api/rides/{id}/status - updates to em_andamento
✅ Rides (refactored): PATCH /api/rides/{id}/status - updates to concluido
✅ Restaurants (refactored): GET /api/restaurants - returns restaurant list with details
✅ Restaurants (refactored): GET /api/restaurants/search - search by query and cuisine
✅ Restaurants (refactored): GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu - returns menu items
✅ Restaurants (refactored): POST /api/orders - creates order with subtotal calculation
✅ Restaurants (refactored): GET /api/orders - lists user orders
✅ Restaurants (refactored): POST /api/reviews - creates/updates review
✅ Restaurants (refactored): GET /api/reviews/{id} - returns reviews with average rating
✅ Backward compat: GET /api/tourist-places - returns tourist places
✅ Backward compat: GET /api/properties - returns properties
✅ Backward compat: POST /api/bookings - creates tourism booking
✅ Backward compat: GET /api/bookings - lists user bookings
✅ Backward compat: POST /api/property-inquiries - creates inquiry
✅ Backward compat: GET /api/property-inquiries - lists inquiries
✅ Other modules: GET /api/wallet - returns wallet with transactions
✅ Other modules: GET /api/coupons/available - returns available coupons
✅ Other modules: POST /api/streak/checkin - performs daily checkin
✅ Other modules: GET /api/notifications/ - returns notifications
✅ Other modules: GET /api/payments/methods - returns 4 payment methods
✅ Frontend: Landing page loads with TudoAqui branding and features
✅ Frontend: Login page loads with email/password inputs
✅ Frontend: Dashboard loads with all modules (Tuendi, Comida, Turismo, Imóveis)
✅ Frontend: Tuendi page loads with ride types (TuendiMoto, Tuendi, TuendiComfort, TuendiBlack)
✅ Frontend: Restaurants page loads with restaurant listings and filters
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring validated: rides_module.py and restaurants_module.py work correctly after extraction from server.py (~1007 lines reduced to ~280 lines)
All backward compatibility routes (/api/tourist-places, /api/properties, /api/bookings, /api/property-inquiries) maintained in server.py
Auth module (auth_module.py) properly handles JWT tokens with 7-day expiration
Wallet, coupons, streak, notifications, payments modules all functional
Driver assignment uses random names from predefined list (MOCKED)

test_credentials.dynamic_test_user: pytest_iter11_{uuid}@test.com with password test123456 (created each test run)

mocked_apis_list: Payment gateway (Multicaixa Express, Unitel Money, BAI Paga) - confirmation codes generated locally
Driver assignment - random names from predefined list (Joao Silva, Maria Santos, etc.)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring fully validated. rides_module.py (taxi/rides routes) and restaurants_module.py (restaurant/orders/reviews routes) extracted from server.py. All 53 backend tests pass (28 iteration11 + 25 refactoring validation). Frontend pages (Landing, Login, Dashboard, Tuendi, Restaurants) all load correctly. App is in Portuguese. Payment gateway and driver assignment are MOCKED/SIMULATED.
